commit_scope: Ship Form-native idea valuation audit-ledger parity and bind it into the reversible native public gate.

commands: cd api && python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_native_idea_valuation_audit_ledger.py tests/test_native_mutation_side_effect_ledger.py tests/test_native_mutation_public_gate.py tests/test_native_mutation_ab_observation.py tests/test_native_mutation_route_bindings.py tests/test_ideas_router_form.py tests/test_spec_registry_router_form.py

cd api && python3 -m ruff check tests/test_native_idea_valuation_audit_ledger.py tests/test_native_mutation_side_effect_ledger.py tests/test_native_mutation_public_gate.py tests/test_native_mutation_ab_observation.py

python3 scripts/validate_spec_quality.py --file specs/native-idea-valuation-audit-ledger.md --file specs/native-mutation-side-effect-ledger.md --file specs/native-mutation-side-effects.md --file specs/native-mutation-route-side-effect-binding.md --file specs/native-mutation-public-gate.md --file specs/ideas-router-form-expression.md --file specs/spec-registry-source-native.md
local_validation.summary: native-idea-valuation-audit-ledger.fk adds a Postgres audit_ledger carrier for Python-parity VALUATION_CHANGE rows with SYSTEM sender/receiver, reason, reference_id, metadata_json, previous_hash, and sha256 hash. The live proof returned 11111111 after direct append, route-runner append, graph revision readback, SQL hash recomputation, previous_hash chain verification, side-effect receipts, contributor-key audit, cleanup, and close. native-mutation-public-gate.fk now exposes nmpg-run-idea-update-public-gate over that carrier; the public-gate live proof returned 111111111. The A/B and public-gate harnesses remain confidence 1.0 with ordinary_traffic_flip_performed=false. Local PR guard passed against origin/codex/native-mutation-side-effect-ledger-20260609 with ready_for_push=True.

known_limitations.observed: No ordinary no-header POST/PATCH/DELETE mutation traffic moved. No-header traffic still fans out to FastAPI.
No deployed X-Form-Native-Public-Gate canary was run in this slice. The next boundary remains deployed header-gated canary evidence before any no-header flip.
Form callers pass old and new values as JSON fragments so metadata_json matches the Python hash content shape.
No production application database writes were attempted.

ci_validation.notes: Pending push of this stacked branch and GitHub checks on a draft PR.

deploy_validation.notes: No public deploy attempted. Ordinary no-header public mutation traffic remains on FastAPI.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Native idea update route runners can now append hash-chained VALUATION_CHANGE audit_ledger rows and the public-gate Form layer has an idea update runner over that carrier, while public no-header mutation traffic remains unchanged.
test_flows: python3 deploy/kernel-router/mutation_ab_observation_harness.py --json -> confidence 1.0 and idea-valuation-audit-ledger intent carried
python3 deploy/kernel-router/mutation_public_gate_harness.py --json -> confidence 1.0 and public gate allowed

cd api && python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_native_idea_valuation_audit_ledger.py tests/test_native_mutation_side_effect_ledger.py tests/test_native_mutation_public_gate.py tests/test_native_mutation_ab_observation.py tests/test_native_mutation_route_bindings.py tests/test_ideas_router_form.py tests/test_spec_registry_router_form.py -> 37 passed
make wellness -> maps aligned and every claimed symbol resolves

phase_gate.reason: Audit-ledger parity is carried Form-native; ordinary mutation traffic still waits for deployed X-Form-Native-Public-Gate canary evidence before any no-header flip.
